violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the men's restroom was lacking paper towels. PIC refilled. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2026

The kitchen (mixing room) lacks a handwashing sink. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2026

The food-contact surfaces of equipment and utensils were not sanitized. The required utensil surface temperature of 160 degrees Fahrenheit was not achieved during the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher as evidenced by the failure of the thermolabel (temperature indicator) affixed to the surface of a utensil to turn black. PIC took unit out of service and will sanitize via 3 bay sink. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/19/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (bowls and mixer attachments) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC washed/sanitized during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2026

Milk was observed held at 50 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC placed milk in a cooler to actively cool. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2026

Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. PIC labeled chemical bottles. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2026

The doors to the outside, located in the back and front, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2026

The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: - slicer - proofer - all lowboy units - knife rack container New Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2026
Inspector observed a clog in the mop sink. New Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2026
The floors in various locations throughout the kitchen areas are in poor repair (need resealing). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2026

The floors, walls, and window ledges in various locations throughout the kitchen and storage areas have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2026
The wall in the frying area is in poor repair (wall is chipping). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/28/2026
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. RIDOH guidance provided during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/05/2024

The food-contact surfaces of equipment and utensils were not sanitized. The required utensil surface temperature of 160 degrees Fahrenheit was not achieved during the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher as evidenced by the failure of the thermolabel (temperature indicator) affixed to the surface of a utensil to turn black. All utensils and equipment must be sanitized in the 3-bay sink until dish machine has been serviced. New Violation. Correct By: 01/19/2024
Bus bins, sheet pans, and other equipment/utensils were observed stored without allow them to air dry. New Violation. Correct By: 01/05/2024

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the service counter area. Take-out boxes were stored on a counter with food debris. Staff placed containers on clean/sanitized sheet pans and cleaned counter during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/05/2024
Nonfood contact surfaces of the following were observed to have an accumulation of food and debris: working containers of fours, tracks of low boy doors, mixers. New Violation. Correct By: 01/05/2024
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine. New Violation. Correct By: 01/12/2024

The dumpster area has an accumulation of debris. Carboard boxes, bags of garbage observed on ground throughout the area. Per PIC, trash was from tenants residing in the building. New Violation. Correct By: 01/05/2024
A light bulb was observed non-functional at the fry-room hood at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 01/19/2024
